steps.title: Find the noun the pronoun must refer to
steps.content:
In “making ______ lighter overall,” the blank is the direct object of the verb “making.” The sentence describes two improvements: flattening the instrument's curves (explicitly mentioned) and making [something] lighter overall.

Since the first action targets the curves, the second action must target the violin itself.

steps.title: Select the pronoun with correct number agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number: “It” is singular and correctly refers to “a traditional violin,” creating “making it lighter overall.” Plural pronouns (them, those) violate this agreement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
